ministers.name: Tan Sri Ahmad Bakar
legacy: Launched the Reform Plan in 2012 (before game starts)
Set transformation vision and KPI targets
ministers.priority_text: Prove the Reform Plan delivers. Show early wins through efficient execution.

transition_in.title: Minister Appointed - 2013
transition_in.message:
Tan Sri Ahmad Bakar, the Reform Plan Architect who launched it in 2012, wants to prove it can deliver results.

His priority: Show efficient execution in the first 3 years.

transition_out.title: Minister Completes Term - 2015
transition_out.message: Tan Sri Ahmad Bakar has completed his term. His legacy: Establishing the Reform Plan framework.

ministers.name: Dato' Seri Ismail Razak
legacy: Focused on teacher welfare and equity
ministers.priority_text: Keep teachers happy. Close the urban-rural gap.

transition_in.title: New Minister Appointed - 2016
transition_in.message:
Dato' Seri Ismail Razak takes over. Known for his steady approach and focus on teacher welfare.

His priority: Close the achievement gap.

transition_out.title: Minister Completes Term - 2018
transition_out.message: Dato' Seri Ismail Razak's tenure ends with general election. His legacy: Stability and teacher focus.

ministers.name: Dr. Nur Aisyah
legacy: Pushed for exam reforms (Primary National Exam/Lower Secondary Assessment abolishment)
ministers.priority_text: Reform the system. Question everything. Put students first.

transition_in.title: New Minister Appointed - May 2018
transition_in.message:
Dr. Nur Aisyah arrives after general election. An academic reformist who wants to shake things up.

His priority: Student outcomes above all else.

transition_out.title: Minister Resigns - February 2020
transition_out.message: Dr. Nur Aisyah's tenure ends abruptly with the political leadership change. His legacy: Bold reforms.

ministers.name: Dr. Kamal Hassan
legacy: Crisis response became his defining achievement
ministers.priority_text: Survive the pandemic. Keep schools accessible.

transition_in.title: New Minister Appointed - March 2020
transition_in.message:
Dr. Kamal Hassan takes over during political crisis. Within weeks, COVID-19 hits.

His priority: Keep education accessible during pandemic.

transition_out.title: Minister Completes Term - 2022
transition_out.message: Dr. Kamal Hassan's tenure ends. His legacy: Steering education through the pandemic.

ministers.name: Puan Siti Hajar
ministers.priority_text: Heal the system. Win back public trust. Focus on wellbeing.

transition_in.title: New Minister Appointed - 2023
transition_in.message:
Ms. Siti Hajar takes over for Wave 3. Known for her empathy and focus on wellbeing.

Her priority: Rebuild trust and heal post-pandemic wounds.

transition_out.title: Reform Plan Concludes - 2025
transition_out.message: Ms. Siti Hajar's tenure ends with the Reform Plan's conclusion. Her legacy: Human-centered recovery.
